commitments.text: refine ways to treat and utilize livestock and poultry manure to reduce GHG emissions from livestock and poultry breeding
promote the fertilization technology of agricultural machinery and agronomy and the substitution of organic fertilizers for chemical fertilizers
refine ways to treat and utilize livestock and poultry manure will be refined in order to reduce GHG emissions from livestock and poultry breeding
improve livestock and poultry productivity, ways to treat and utilize livestock and poultry manure will be refined in order to reduce GHG emissions from livestock and poultry breeding

measurability.reason: All commitments lack specific numbers, units, target years, and baselines.

gap_findings.description: China's NDC commitments lack specific methane reduction targets.
gap_findings.ndc_evidence: No specific methane reduction targets found in NDC2_2021_China.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 SPM recommends reducing methane ~34% by 2030 vs 2020 (WG3_SPM_2022, p.42).

gap_findings.description: China's NDC commitments lack quantification, baseline, or timeline for methane reduction.
gap_findings.ndc_evidence: NDC2_2021_China mentions refining ways to treat and utilize livestock and poultry manure (NDC2_2021_China, p.43).
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 SPM recommends reducing methane ~34% by 2030 vs 2020 (WG3_SPM_2022, p.42).
gap_findings.quantified_gap: NDC: null, IPCC min: 34%, gap: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE

gap_findings.description: China's NDC commitments do not contradict IPCC recommendations, but lack ambition.
gap_findings.ndc_evidence: NDC2_2021_China mentions improving livestock and poultry productivity (NDC2_2021_China, p.43).
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 SPM recommends reducing methane ~34% by 2030 vs 2020 (WG3_SPM_2022, p.42).
gap_findings.quantified_gap: NDC: null, IPCC min: 34%, gap: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE

details.summary: China's NDC commitments lack specific methane reduction targets and lack quantification, baseline, or timeline for methane reduction, but do not contradict IPCC recommendations.
